chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Misc. A. No. 578 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For order as to maintainability of this Cr.M.A. 18.08.2025 ---------- None present for the applicant. No intimation is received. On last date, counsel for the applicant was put on notice to satisfy this Court regarding maintainability of this Criminal Misc. Application. Accordingly, this Cr. Misc. Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Ashraf
